purpose: Record the focused Ranged Combat sub-bucket pass from the strict Combat bucket.

policy.scope: This sub-bucket covers Opportunistic Shooter and Mighty Throw.
policy.reactionContext: Opportunistic Shooter is now concrete metadata: +2 feat bonus to attacks of opportunity with ranged weapons, applied only after the workflow confirms ranged AoO context.
policy.thrownWeaponContext: Mighty Throw is now concrete thrown-weapon metadata: add Strength modifier in addition to Dexterity on thrown-weapon ranged attack rolls and extend each range category by Strength modifier squares. It must not mutate non-thrown ranged attacks.

implementedEntries.name: Opportunistic Shooter
implementedEntries.mechanic: Adds +2 feat bonus to attacks of opportunity with ranged weapons when the workflow confirms ranged AoO context.

implementedEntries.name: Mighty Throw
implementedEntries.mechanic: For thrown weapons, including grenades and grenadelike weapons, add Strength modifier to the ranged attack bonus in addition to Dexterity and increase each range category by Strength modifier squares.
